_rationale.purpose: Parity proof for DART-6lwWAw28lQfj: `lci search --regex --files-with-matches` must mirror Go. Go's standard search ignores --files-with-matches; C++ previously switched into files-only summary mode producing structurally different output.
_rationale.fix: Stripped client-side files-only summary mode from run_search. Standard display fall-through.
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout matches Go after text_normalize.
